steps.title: Set up
steps.content: The map is reduced to 30% of the original (70% shorter means 30% remains). New side: $45 × 0.30 = 13.5$ inches. Total geographic distance is fixed: $45 × 13 = 585$ miles.

steps.title: Solve
steps.content:
New scale = total miles ÷ new inches:
$$\frac{585}{13.5} = \frac{130}{3} \approx 43.\overline{3} \text{ miles per inch}$$
